stemHtml: An aircraft is being radar-vectored to Zurich airport. The crew is told arrival VORs are unserviceable. The aircraft is 10 miles south of Trasadingen VOR, being vectored to SAFFIA before following the WIL 3Z arrival for ILS RWY 14. What phraseology is used when vectoring terminates?

options.a: Resume own navigation and continue to SAFFIA, then follow the procedure.
options.b: Radar vectoring terminated on to SAFFIA, then followed the procedure.
options.c: Hold at SAFFIA and wait for further instructions.
options.d: Radar vectoring terminated, proceed direct to ILS IKL.
